jd_text: Act as Technical Authority with corporate accountability for technical delivery across Naval Architecture discipline. Support Director - EPC Engineering (Hull & Marine) on stewarding department strategy on capability development, sustainment and industry engagements. Day-to-day operations: Manage technical due diligence of project deliverables against Naval Architectural disciplines and counterparts across Hull & Marine and Topside Facilities disciplines. Technical stewardship on all Naval Architecture disciplines deliverables for tenders / project phases. Provide support to EPC functional and business leadership on market developments, competitor assessment, corporate business strategy developments. Identify and steward development and career path for discipline personnel. Technical competencies: Advanced working knowledge on design and operational aspects of floating structures. Well versed with procedures, specifications, drawings, and all other naval architecture discipline engineering deliverables and project documentation. Demonstrated Technical ownership on development on knowledge based engineering tools and systems for discipline capability sustainment. Strong track record of delivering end-to-end concept design, technology development and project execution life cycle for floating structures. Strong experience with application of regulatory and code-based design and regulatory compliance for full life cycle aspects of floating structures. Demonstratable industry / market acumen and broader networking within OEMs / engineering service providers / industry committees. Well versed hand-on expertise on key aspects related to offshore floater sizing and layout development, subsea equipment interfaces to floater and their selection criterion, floater stability and weight control, structural design and hydrodynamic analysis (floaters & mooring system). Preferable to have exposure / ownership experience on product development frameworks for offshore floaters and mission critical system / components. CAE Skills : Working experience with Microsoft platforms such as SharePoint, OneDrive and Office suite. Hands-on experience with 2D drafting tools such as AutoCAD or similar, 3D modelling environment such as AVEVA E3D or similar, NURBS modelling tools such as Rhinoceros 3D or similar. Working experience with one or more areas of industry standard analysis tools for rules-based floater design / floater stability / structural / hydrodynamics & mooring engineering. Expertise in developing workflow automation tools using Excel VBA Macros / Python or equivalent scripting frameworks is a minimum requirement. Education Master’s Degree in: Ocean Structures (or) Offshore Engineering (or) Naval Architecture (or) Marine Technology Experience Minimum cumulative experience 20+ years of experience with current role as in two or more of the following industry players culminating to role as Principal Engineer / Subject Matter Expert: (1) Tier – I EPCIC Turnkey Services and Contractor Organisations as Principal and Subject Matter Expert roles. (2) Specialists’ offshore floater / subsea engineering service providers with track record on floater / mooring system concept definition to construction follow up / handover phase ownership. (3) Offshore Production Units Lease-Own-Operate organisations. Functional membership in industrial networks such as OMAE / ISOPE / OTC / SPE committees and organisations. Strong network with OEMs and engineering service industry.
